entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species in which a new source of genetic male sterility was identified

entities.name: GENETIC MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A condition where the plant is unable to produce functional male gametes

entities.name: UNIVERSITY OF QUEENSLAND
entities.description: The institution where the new male sterile source was identified

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The country where the University of Queensland is located

entities.name: ANTHER MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: The physical structure and appearance of the anthers, used to distinguish types of male sterility

entities.name: TRANSLUCENT MALE STERILITY
entities.description: A previously identified type of male sterility found at ICRISAT

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization where the translucent type of male sterility was previously found

entities.name: ACETO-CARMINE STAINING
entities.description: A staining technique used to visualize pollen grains in anthers

entities.name: POLLEN GRAINS
entities.description: The male gametophytes produced in the anthers
